Supported Platforms

All the tools you need in one place

Simple, powerful social media management. No complicated setup.

One Post, Everywhere

Write once. We automatically post to all your connected accounts across every platform.

AI Content Generator

Tell us your business. Our AI creates engaging posts tailored to your audience.

Smart Scheduling

Post at the perfect time. We analyze your audience and find the best moments.

Auto-Post Forever

Set it once. We post every day, week, or month automatically. Just sit back.

Analytics Dashboard

See what works. Track likes, shares, comments, and grow your audience.

Affordable Pricing

A fraction of what agencies charge. Start free, upgrade when you need more.
